item.title: NVIDIA Powers Over 400 of the World’s 500 Fastest Supercomputers
item.description: Focus: News Highlights: NVIDIA technology runs 81% of the TOP500 and 90% of the systems new to the list. 26 systems on the TOP500 adopted the NVIDIA Grace CPU, up eight from the previous list. The top eight systems on the Green500 run on NVIDIA GPUs and nine of the top 10 use NVIDIA technologies. No

item.title: NVIDIA Brings Trusted, 24/7 AI Agents to Telecom Operations
item.description: Focus: Telecom operators have seen remarkable returns from using generative AI to automate network management, customer care and back-office operations. Most of that impact has been task‑based: automation that speeds up predetermined steps while people manually correlate insights and direct next ste

item.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
item.description: Focus: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

item.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
item.description: Focus: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

item.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
item.description: Focus: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

item.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: The new inner game: Your unfair advantage in the age of AI
item.description: Focus: A playbook for the biggest upheaval of work we’ll see in our lifetime

item.title: [AINews] SpaceX is already a $28B/yr Neocloud
item.description: Focus: a quiet day lets us reflect on some numbers from Jamin Ball.

item.title: How Businesses Are Building Specialized AI They Can Trust
item.description: Focus: Companies are asking how to build specialized AI that fits with the way their workflows actually run. The first wave of enterprise AI was about access. Companies experimented with new frontier and open models, ran pilots and explored how AI can help. Now, specialized agents — systems of model

item.title: ParallelKernelBench: Frontier LLMs can't write fast multi-GPU kernels (yet)
item.description: Focus: ParallelKernelBench tests whether LLMs can write fast multi-GPU CUDA kernels across 87 real workloads. The best model solves under a third, but a few generated kernels beat any public implementation.

item.title: Deploy Node servers with zero configuration
item.description: Focus: You can now deploy a Node.js server to Vercel with zero configuration. Vercel detects a server.ts file at the project root or at src/server.ts and deploys it as a Node.js application, in addition to existing zero-configuration backends like Express, Koa, and NestJS: Vercel CLI can handle loca

item.title: Custom OIDC Token Audiences
item.description: Focus: Vercel's OIDC issuer ( oidc.vercel.com ) now supports custom audiences. Deployments can request OIDC tokens with a specific audience claim, enabling secure service-to-service authentication with third-party providers. Why custom audiences? Vercel OIDC tokens are issued with a fixed audience (

item.title: Redesigned trace viewer for Vercel Workflows
item.description: Focus: The trace viewer for Vercel Workflows and Workflow SDK has been redesigned to better support inspecting runs from start to finish. Search across spans, zoom into any section of the timeline, and step through with the keyboard to find what you're looking for fast, then click into any step to s

item.title: WebSocket support is now in Public Beta
item.description: Focus: Vercel Functions can now serve WebSocket connections, enabling bidirectional communication between clients and server-side code on Vercel. Use WebSockets for realtime features such as interactive AI streaming, chat, and collaborative apps. WebSocket connections run on Fluid compute and follow
